title: xript Mod Manifest
description: Declarative manifest for xript mods. Declares metadata, required capabilities, entry scripts, and UI fragment contributions.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete.

xript.description: The xript specification version this mod targets.

name.description: Machine-readable mod identifier. Used in namespacing and generated package names.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the mod.

description.description: A brief description of what this mod does.

author.description: The mod author's name or handle.

capabilities.description: Capabilities this mod requires from the host application.

entry.description: Script entry point(s) relative to the mod root directory.

fragments.description: UI fragment contributions targeting host-declared slots.

fragment.description: A UI fragment that targets a host-declared slot.

id.description: Unique fragment identifier within this mod.

slot.description: Target slot ID from the host application's manifest.

format.description: MIME type of the fragment content.

source.description: Fragment content: a file path relative to the mod root, or inline markup when 'inline' is true.

inline.description: When true, 'source' contains inline markup rather than a file path.

bindings.description: Data bindings that wire host state to data-bind attributes in the fragment.

events.description: Event handlers that wire DOM events to sandboxed script functions.

priority.description: Ordering priority within the target slot. Higher values render earlier. Ties broken alphabetically by fragment ID.

fragmentBinding.description: A named data binding that resolves a host data path to a local name for use in data-bind attributes.

name.description: Local binding name referenced by data-bind attributes in the fragment markup.

path.description: Dot-separated path to resolve against the host's data layer (e.g. 'player.health.val').

fragmentEvent.description: A declarative event-to-handler mapping. The runtime attaches event listeners matching the selector and delegates to the named handler in the mod's sandboxed script.

selector.description: CSS selector targeting element(s) within the fragment. For non-HTML formats, the targeting mechanism is format-specific.

on.description: DOM event name to listen for (e.g. 'click', 'input', 'change').

handler.description: Name of a function in the mod's sandboxed script to call when the event fires.
